features.name: brief-staleness tracking
features.description: Session tracks last_brief_at, last_brief_score, last_scan_score, tool_calls_since_brief. _brief_staleness_reason() detects stale briefs by score delta (>0.05), time (>600 s), or call count (>10).

features.name: SG enforcement hardened
features.description: drift_fix_apply and drift_patch_begin reset brief-staleness counters on execution (SG-005/SG-006 hardened). Brief enrichments (layer_contract, relevant_tests, active_adrs) stored in session for staleness comparison.

features.name: adr_scanner enrichments
features.description: adr_scanner extended with additional scope path filtering and improved keyword matching for task-based ADR relevance.

features.name: mypy and ruff fixes
features.description: Corrected prepared_exclude type annotations in file_discovery (tuple[PreparedPattern, ...] instead of tuple[re.Pattern[str], ...]). getattr fallback for repo_path in session_handover to avoid AttributeError on duck-typed session objects. Simplified conditionals in session_handover (SIM103/SIM102). Broke overlong line in nudge.py (E501).
